adapter_requirements: runtime descriptor registered with chromium family
profile create/update/import/restore stores runtime_id, not engine
launch path assembles deterministic profile-specific args without mutating unrelated runtimes
Playwright bind endpoint is reachable for launched sessions
browser cache version marker prevents stale seeded runtime reuse
smoke rest and smoke mcp pass under Docker

launch path propagates profile fingerprint UA/UA-CH, locale, hardware, screen, plugins, canvas, audio, fonts, WebGL, WebRTC proxy region metadata, and native stealth config switches into BrowseForge Chromium
release_blockers: external proxy exit-IP/geolocation detector evidence is missing
Windows native detector evidence is missing
native headed proxy and Windows detector matrix remains incomplete
runtime release_grade must remain false until supported platform artifacts and live detector gates pass

browseforge_repository_evidence.summary: BrowseForge launch_chromium propagates profile fingerprint identity and trimmed proxy region metadata into BrowseForge Chromium native switches and persona config; group proxy storage normalizes proxy region metadata across effective proxy, reload, export, and import paths; config.default/API docs expose the optional proxy region metadata field for browseforge-chromium workflows.
